# Utah Backyard ADUs

> Utah-based ADU (accessory dwelling unit) builder. Founder-led, 50+ ADUs of experience. Custom stickbuilt construction, factory-built modular units, and garage-to-ADU conversions across the Wasatch Front and greater Utah.

Utah Backyard ADUs designs, permits, and builds backyard accessory dwelling units for Utah homeowners who want rental income, multigenerational housing, or extra living space. Every estimate starts with a free, no-obligation property visit. Licensed Utah general contractor.

## Services & typical pricing
- Garage conversion: $50,000-$120,000
- Modular / prefab ADU: $120,000-$200,000
- Custom stickbuilt ADU: $120,000-$300,000

## Service area
Salt Lake City, Provo, Ogden, St. George, and surrounding Utah communities.

## Key pages
- Home (https://utahbackyardadus.com/index.html): overview, FAQ, free estimate form
- Models (https://utahbackyardadus.com/models.html): 5 floor plans - The Ridgeline (560 sqft, 1bd), The Cottonwood (594 sqft, 1bd), The Park City (960 sqft, 2bd), The Wasatch (748 sqft, 2bd, custom stickbuilt, starting at $220,000), The Juniper (480 sqft, 1bd, modular, starting at $120,943)
- Pricing (https://utahbackyardadus.com/pricing.html): cost breakdown by ADU type
- Financing (https://utahbackyardadus.com/financing.html): HELOC / home equity financing guide and FAQ
- Gallery (https://utahbackyardadus.com/gallery.html): completed project photos
- Contact (https://utahbackyardadus.com/contact.html): free estimate request form
